prerequisites: An active Survicate account on a subscription plan that includes API access (you can create your account at panel.survicate.com).
A Survicate API key generated in the Survicate panel (used for the `api_key` config field).
A `start_date` value marking the earliest point from which survey response data should be synced.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: Survicate's Data Export API authenticates with an API key. Supply it in the connector's `api_key` field; the connector sends it as an HTTP `Authorization: Basic {{apiKey}}` header on each request. Generate the key in the Survicate panel under the Surveys Settings tab, in the Access Keys section.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Survicate API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Survicate panel at panel.survicate.com. Open the Surveys Settings tab and go to the Access Keys section to create or copy your API key. Your account must be subscribed to a plan that includes API access for the key to work.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_key
setupSteps.body: Paste the API key into the connector's required `api_key` field. The connector authenticates by sending it as an `Authorization: Basic {{apiKey}}` header against the Survicate Data Export API (current version v2).

setupSteps.title: Set the start_date
setupSteps.body: Set the required `start_date` field to the earliest date from which survey and response data should be retrieved. Records collected before this date are excluded from the sync.

sources.title: Survicate Data Export API: Setup (authentication, API key generation, plan requirement, rate limits)
Survicate Data Export API: Overview (purpose, resources, v2)
